description: Moments provider currently mixes remote listener hydration with local Drift watch and uses upsert-only persistence, which can leave stale rows after remote deletes and split read source-of-truth.
resolution: Before moments PowerSync rollout, enforce one authoritative read path and add deletion reconciliation when applying remote snapshots to local storage.

name: Notification flows should use local-first reads
description: Unread count is realtime but notification list and moment deep-link navigation still depend on remote fetches; align notifications with local-first providers to support offline push-navigation and future PowerSync domain migration.
